goal: Prevent lidar and STM32 base from opening the same serial device during mapping/navigation launches.
deliverable: robot.sh serial conflict guard plus traceable requirement and plan artifacts.
constraints: Do not run ROS or hardware commands locally.
Do not rename packages, topics, nodes, or frames.
Do not modify device parameters beyond safe launch-time conflict resolution.
acceptance: Real base launch fails fast if base and lidar resolve to the same device.
Default base port conflict triggers active base detection excluding the lidar port.
Mapping, navigation, and full system use the same guard.
